description: Matrix showing which schedules appear in each ITR form and whether they are compulsory or optional.

legend.C: Compulsory — must be filled if applicable
legend.O: Optional — fill only if relevant income/transaction exists
legend.NA: Not applicable — schedule not present in this form

schedules.scheduleName: Part A — General Information (PAN, Aadhaar, Address, Bank, Regime)
schedules.description: Personal details, bank account for refund, tax regime selection, filing category

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule S — Income from Salary
schedules.description: Salary breakup: gross salary, allowances exempt u/s 10, standard deduction, professional tax
schedules.ITR-4: O (if any salary income alongside business)

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule HP — Income from House Property
schedules.description: Rental income or loss from owned house property. Self-occupied: nil NAV. Let-out: rental minus deductions.
schedules.ITR-4: O (up to 2 properties — expanded FY 2025-26 from 1)

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule BP — Business/Professional Income Particulars
schedules.description: ITR-3: Actual P&L, depreciation, partner remuneration. ITR-4: Presumptive income section + FY 2025-26 NEW mandatory cash/bank balance disclosure.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule CG — Capital Gains
schedules.description: Long-term and short-term capital gains from all asset types. Includes Schedule 112A (equity LTCG), Schedule CFL (loss carry-forward).
schedules.ITR-4: O (restricted — LTCG 112A within ₹1.25L only, NEW FY 2025-26)

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule 112A — LTCG on Listed Equity (STT-paid) — Break-up
schedules.description: Transaction-wise break-up of LTCG on listed equity shares and equity MF units

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule CFL — Carry Forward of Losses
schedules.description: Losses from prior years being carried forward — capital losses, house property losses, business losses

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule OS — Income from Other Sources
schedules.description: Interest income (savings, FD), dividend income, family pension, winnings, VDA income

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule VI-A — Deductions (Chapter VI-A: 80C, 80D, 80G, etc.)
schedules.description: All individual deductions: 80C (PF, LIC), 80CCD (NPS), 80D (health), 80E (edu loan), 80G (donations), etc.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule FA — Foreign Assets and Income
schedules.description: Disclosure of foreign bank accounts, investments, business interests, and income from foreign sources

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule FSI — Foreign Source Income
schedules.description: Income earned from sources outside India (for residents disclosing foreign income)

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule TR — Tax Relief (DTAA Foreign Tax Credit)
schedules.description: Foreign tax credit claimed under Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA). Tax paid abroad credited against Indian tax liability.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule DPM — Depreciation on Plant & Machinery
schedules.description: Block-wise depreciation computation for business assets

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule DOA — Depreciation on Other Assets (Buildings, etc.)
schedules.description: Depreciation on buildings and other fixed assets (non-P&M)

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule UDL — Unabsorbed Depreciation and Losses
schedules.description: Carry-forward of unabsorbed depreciation from previous years

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule MAT — Minimum Alternate Tax Computation (Section 115JB)
schedules.description: MAT computation: 15% of book profit if lower than normal tax. Only for companies.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule AMT — Alternate Minimum Tax (Section 115JC) for non-corporate entities
schedules.description: AMT at 18.5% of adjusted total income for partnership firms and LLPs claiming deductions u/s 10AA, 80HH to 80RRB

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule TDS1 — TDS on Salary
schedules.description: TDS deducted by employer on salary. Data from Form 16.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule TDS2 — TDS on Non-Salary Income
schedules.description: TDS on FD interest, rent, professional fees, dividends, etc.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule TCS — Tax Collected at Source
schedules.description: TCS on LRS remittances, vehicle purchase, goods purchase, etc. Credited against tax liability.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule IT — Advance Tax and Self-Assessment Tax
schedules.description: Challan details for advance tax payments and self-assessment tax paid

schedules.scheduleName: Part B — Gross Total Income
schedules.description: Summary of all income heads: salary + HP + CG + business + other sources

schedules.scheduleName: Part B-TTI — Total Tax Liability
schedules.description: Final computation: total income → tax at rates → surcharge → cess → rebate → TDS credit → net payable/refund

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule EI — Exempt Income
schedules.description: Income exempt from tax: agricultural income, NRE interest, dividends (pre-DDT), LTCG within exempt limit, etc.

schedules.scheduleName: Schedule SI — Special Rate Income
schedules.description: Income taxable at special rates: LTCG at 12.5%, STCG at 20%, lottery at 30%, VDA at 30%
